name: Accredible Digital Certificate and Badge API
what_it_does: Accredible digital certificate and badge management REST API for organizations to issue, verify, and manage digital credentials, certificates, and badges for online courses, certifications, and professional achievements. Enables AI agents to manage digital certificate and badge template creation for credential design automation, handle certificate and badge issuance and recipient delivery for certification award automation, access blockchain credential anchoring and verification for tamper-proof credential automation, retrieve credential verification and authenticity check for employer verification automation, manage batch credential issuance for large-scale course completion automation, handle credential expiry and renewal management for certification lifecycle automation, access credential analytics and engagement tracking for program performance automation, retrieve issuer branding and white-label certificate customization for branded credential automation, manage group and cohort credential issuance for cohort certification automation, and integrate Accredible with LMS platforms (Moodle, Teachable, Kajabi), HR systems, and professional networks for end-to-end credential lifecycle management.
use_cases: Issuing course certificates from LMS completion agents
Verifying credentials from employer background check agents
Awarding badges from achievement automation agents
Managing credential expiry from renewal workflow agents
not_for: Government identity and official license credentials
High-security credential issuance (use Digicert or government PKI)
best_when: An online education platform, corporate training program, professional association, or certification body wanting AI agents to automate digital certificate issuance, credential verification, batch delivery, and renewal management via Accredible's digital credentialing platform.
avoid_when: BLOCKCHAIN ANCHORING VS OFFICIAL CREDENTIAL EQUIVALENCE: Accredible blockchain credential anchoring provides tamper-evidence, not legal equivalence to official accredited credentials; automated use of Accredible blockchain-anchored certificate as official academic or professional credential without proper accreditation creates misrepresentation. BATCH ISSUANCE ACCURACY FOR HIGH-VOLUME PROGRAMS: Automated batch certificate issuance for large programs (10,000+ learners) must validate recipient data accuracy before batch submission; automated batch with incorrect recipient names, dates, or achievement data creates credential error at scale requiring mass revocation and reissuance. GDPR CREDENTIAL SHARING AND EU RECIPIENT DATA: Automated Accredible certificate issuance for EU learners involves creating public credential page with learner name and achievement data; automated public credential creation requires GDPR lawful basis for processing and sharing EU learner personal data.

auth.notes: Accredible uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Cambridge, UK HQ with US office (San Francisco). Founded 2013 by Danny King. Private ($16M raised). 3,000+ issuing organizations. 12M+ credentials issued. Blockchain credential anchoring option. LMS integrations: Moodle, Canvas, Teachable, Kajabi, LearnDash. White-label certificate customization. Open Badges standard support. Competes with Credly (Pearson), Badgr (Instructure), and Canvas Credentials for digital credentialing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for up to 50 credentials/year
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly/annual subscription by credential volume; starter, growth, and enterprise tiers; blockchain anchoring add-on; white-label customization in higher tiers
pricing.notes: Cambridge UK / San Francisco CA. Private. Founded 2013. Free tier 50 credentials/year. Subscription by credential volume. Blockchain anchoring add-on. 3,000+ issuing organizations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; credential issuance and retrieval queries throttled; webhooks for issuance and expiry events

known_agent_gotchas: API KEY NO SCOPE GRANULARITY: Accredible uses API key authentication without scope controls; all API key access is full account access including credential deletion and template management; implement dedicated read-only API key for verification agents; use write-access API key only for issuance workflows

BATCH ISSUANCE DATA VALIDATION BEFORE SUBMISSION: Automated batch certificate issuance must validate recipient data (name, email, achievement) before submission; Accredible batch API processes all records including those with invalid data; batch submission without pre-validation creates partial success with invalid recipient records requiring manual remediation

CREDENTIAL EXPIRY REVOCATION AUTOMATION: Automated credential issuance with expiry date requires scheduled revocation trigger; Accredible does not auto-revoke expired credentials; implement expiry-based revocation cron job for time-limited certification programs

BLOCKCHAIN ANCHORING COST AND TIMING: Accredible blockchain anchoring adds cost and processing time; automated blockchain anchoring for all issued credentials adds unnecessary cost for high-volume low-value credentials; implement blockchain anchoring selectively for high-stakes certifications

LMS INTEGRATION WEBHOOK DELIVERY RELIABILITY: Accredible LMS integrations (Moodle, Canvas) use webhooks for course completion triggers; automated issuance dependent on LMS webhook must implement retry logic for missed or delayed completion events; test LMS webhook delivery reliability before relying on automated issuance

GDPR PUBLIC CREDENTIAL PAGE FOR EU LEARNERS: Automated Accredible credential issuance creates public URL for credential display; EU learner public profile with name and achievement data requires GDPR lawful basis; implement EU learner consent workflow or configure private credential visibility for GDPR compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital credentialing. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Learner PII and credential data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Digital credentials. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Learner PII and credential data.
